title: Guide on the transition to post-quantum cryptography
summary: DNSC guide on migrating to post-quantum cryptography, noting that NIST-standardised PQC algorithms are mathematically validated but lack operational maturity, and addressing crypto-agility for Romanian organisations.

title: Analysis: Current state of cryptography in cybersecurity
summary: DNSC analysis of the current state of cryptography in cybersecurity, including the need to transition to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) to protect digital infrastructure.

title: National strategy on quantum technologies (Annex 41)
summary: Romanian government national strategy on quantum technologies, covering quantum communications and post-quantum cryptography among the addressed quantum technology domains.

title: Funding call: Integration of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) algorithms into high-level protocols
summary: Romanian government EU-funding opportunities portal listing a call for the integration of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) algorithms into high-level protocols.

title: România intră în era securității cuantice (launch of RExQTCS center of excellence)
summary: Romanian National Authority for Research announcement (27 April 2026) of the launch of RExQTCS, the Romanian Centre of Excellence in Quantum Technologies for Enhancing Cybersecurity (coordinated by Politehnica University of Bucharest, ~86 million lei funding), explicitly linking frontier research in classical and post-quantum ('post-cuantică') cryptography to communications security.
